name: Tofu Cat Litter - Unscented (Original) - 6L
shortDescription: Tofu cat litter produces minimal dust, helping reduce respiratory irritation for both cats and humans. This makes it especially beneficial for kittens, sensitive cats, and households affected by allergies or asthma. Its soft, lightweight texture is gentle on your cat’s paws, encouraging comfortable and stress-free litter use.
description: Create a cleaner, healthier environment for both your cat and your home with Tofu Cat Litter 6L - an eco-friendly, ultra-absorbent litter designed with the wellbeing of pets and pet owners in mind. Made from natural tofu fibers, this premium litter offers powerful odor control, low dust performance, and a safer, more comfortable litter experience for everyday use. Tofu cat litter produces minimal dust, helping reduce respiratory irritation for both cats and humans. This makes it especially beneficial for kittens, sensitive cats, and households affected by allergies or asthma. Its soft, lightweight texture is gentle on your cat’s paws, encouraging comfortable and stress-free litter use. Tofu Cat Litter absorbs moisture quickly and forms tight clumps that lock in odors and bacteria, helping maintain a cleaner and more hygienic litter box. The natural formula is biodegradable and environmentally friendly, giving pet owners a safer and more sustainable alternative without compromising performance. Health & Lifestyle Benefits Low-dust formula helps support healthier breathing for cats and owners Natural tofu fibers are gentle on sensitive paws Excellent odor control keeps your home fresher and cleaner Fast absorption helps reduce bacterial growth and moisture buildup Lightweight and easy to clean with strong clumping action Eco-friendly and biodegradable for sustainable pet care Ideal for kittens, adult cats, and multi-cat households How to Use Pour the tofu cat litter into a clean, dry litter tray to a depth of 5–7 cm. Allow your cat to use the litter box as normal. Scoop out clumps and solid waste daily to maintain freshness. Refill with fresh litter as needed to maintain the recommended depth. Clean the entire litter tray regularly for optimal hygiene. Safe & Pet-Friendly Made from natural, non-toxic tofu materials, this litter is a safer option for curious cats and kittens. If small amounts are accidentally ingested during grooming or exploration, there is generally no cause for alarm. However, excessive ingestion should still be avoided, and pet owners are advised to monitor their pets and consult a veterinarian if any unusual symptoms occur. The weight of a 6L tofu cat litter bag usually ranges between 2.3 kg to 2.8 kg , depending on the brand and pellet density. Most commonly, a 6L bag weighs around 2.5 kg . For one cat , a 6L bag of Tofu Cat Litter typically lasts: About 3 to 4 weeks with regular daily scooping Up to 1 month for a clean single-cat household Around 1 to 2 weeks in multi-cat homes This depends on: Your cat’s size and litter habits The size of the litter tray How often clumps are removed How deep the litter is filled (recommended 5–7 cm) Because tofu litter has strong clumping and absorption properties, you only remove the used portions daily, which helps the litter last longer and reduces waste compared to many traditional litters. Give your cat the comfort they deserve while enjoying a cleaner, fresher, and healthier home with Tofu Cat Litter 6L - premium care for modern pet living.
